claims.summary: Rescue-policy heartbeat blocks should record an exact reason.
claims.disposition: Verified structured blocked receipts and bounded reason logging.

claims.summary: Heartbeat admission must remain separate from enqueue outcome.
claims.disposition: Verified SemanticHeartbeatEnqueueProbeV1 records blocked, enqueued, and channel-closed outcomes.

claims.summary: Heartbeat evidence should include current Minime texture and generated-signal continuity.
claims.disposition: Verified current observation builder records both without granting control.

claims.summary: Skipped-heartbeat frequency should be compared with high-pressure felt moments.
claims.disposition: Routed to the existing capture-first heartbeat campaign without induced blocking.

claims.summary: Heartbeat intensity should rise to 0.45 or cadence should accelerate under pressure.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 cadence, intensity, and live sensory-control wait.
